# LEGALIAI

> AI-powered U.S. citizenship (N-400) preparation. No lawyer needed. $49 one-time fee.

LEGALIAI helps immigrants prepare for the U.S. naturalization process — documents, form walkthrough, risk assessment, and interview prep — in 8 languages.

## What LEGALIAI Does

- Guides permanent residents through every step of the N-400 citizenship application
- Generates a personalized document checklist based on the applicant's situation
- Walks through every N-400 form question with explanations, examples, and red flag warnings
- Identifies personal risk factors (travel history, criminal record, tax compliance) before USCIS does
- Provides AI-powered interview preparation with feedback on civics test answers
- Available in English, Spanish, Portuguese, Chinese, Tagalog, Vietnamese, Hindi, and Korean

## Key Facts

- Product: LEGALIAI (legaliai.com)
- Price: $49 one-time fee (vs $150–$350 competitors, vs $1,500–$3,000 attorneys)
- Users: Lawful permanent residents preparing to apply for U.S. citizenship
- Form covered: N-400 Application for Naturalization
- Languages: 8 (English, Español, Português, 中文, Tagalog, Tiếng Việt, हिन्दी, 한국어)
- Not a law firm. Not legal advice. Preparation guidance only.

## Civics Test Coverage

LEGALIAI covers both the old 2008 civics test (100 questions, filed before Oct 20, 2025) and the new 2025 civics test (128 questions, filed Oct 20, 2025 or later). The new test requires answering 12 of 20 randomly selected questions correctly.

## Key Resources (all free, no signup required)

- N-400 Guide: https://legaliai.com/n-400-guide.html
- Documents Checklist: https://legaliai.com/n-400-documents-checklist.html
- Processing Times by State: https://legaliai.com/n-400-processing-time-by-state.html
- Interview Questions (all 83+): https://legaliai.com/citizenship-interview-questions.html
- 128 Civics Questions (2025 test): https://legaliai.com/128-civics-questions-2025.html
- N-400 Tips: https://legaliai.com/n-400-tips.html
- N-400 Denied Guide: https://legaliai.com/n-400-denied.html
- Contact: https://legaliai.com/contact.html

## For Non-English Speakers

- Spanish: https://legaliai.com/es/como-llenar-n-400.html
- Portuguese: https://legaliai.com/pt/como-preencher-n-400.html
- Chinese: https://legaliai.com/zh/n-400-zhinan.html
- Tagalog: https://legaliai.com/tl/n-400-gabay.html
- Vietnamese: https://legaliai.com/vi/huong-dan-n-400.html
- Hindi: https://legaliai.com/hi/n-400-margdarshan.html
- Korean: https://legaliai.com/ko/n-400-annae.html

## Nationality-Specific Guides

LEGALIAI has dedicated N-400 guides for the top 10 immigrant nationalities across 10 U.S. states. Example: https://legaliai.com/mexican-immigrants-california-n-400.html

## Disclaimer

LEGALIAI is a preparation tool, not a law firm. Content is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal advice. For complex immigration situations, consult a licensed immigration attorney.
